arts.ttl: Lee Carsley explains controversial decision to drop England captain Harry Kane
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane was surprisingly left on the bench by interim manager Lee Carsley for their Nations League game against Greece in Athens on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Sorry Harry, England stars are RIGHT to skip POINTLESS international games
arts.sum: Harry Kane admitted his disappointment over seeing many of his teammates withdraw from international duty this week but the trend is undoubtedly a sign of things to come with the ever-increasing intensity to the football calendar. Real eventually confirmed they would feature in the tournament, while FIFA have cited the financial gains from global nations as a reason for the increase in matches and teams.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright furiously slams Harry Kane for calling out England stars - but Roy Keane disagrees
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane delivered a frank interview as several players pulled out of Lee Carsley's squad for the UEFA Nations League matches against Greece and Ireland

arts.ttl: LIVE: Kane benched as England take on Greece
arts.sum: Athens is the venue as England look to avoid a Greek tragedy in the UEFA Nations League. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Ian Wright blasts Harry Kane for criticising the NINE England stars to pull out of Lee Carsley's squad as Arsenal legend insists 'I can't understand it, I'm shocked'
arts.sum: England are in Athens to take on Greece in a must-win game for the Three Lions, as they look to bounce back from the 2-1 defeat they suffered at home to Thursday night's hosts and top the group.

arts.ttl: Which England players could make their debuts against Greece?
arts.sum: England take on Greece in a crucial UEFA Nations League clash this evening as the two teams go head-to-head for top spot and promotion. The Three Lions arrive in Athens still smarting from their defeat to Greece last month, after Vangelis Pavlidis scored twice to earn the visitors a famous win at Wembley. Greece had […] The post Which England players could make their debuts against Greece? first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Kane dropped, Jones debuts – England name XI to face Greece
arts.sum: Lee Carsley has named his England team to take on Greece in the UEFA Nations League this evening. Harry Kane drops to the bench in the biggest call from the interim boss, with Ollie Watkins preferred at centre-forward. Kane is England’s record goalscorer and has netted 17 times in 16 appearances for Bayern Munich this […] The post Kane dropped, Jones debuts – England name XI to face Greece first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Captain Kane unhappy at England squad withdrawals
arts.sum: Captain Harry Kane is unhappy with the number of players who have withdrawn from the latest England squad, insisting "England comes before club".

arts.ttl: Harry Kane dropped by Lee Carsley amid fallout from England captain's blast at team-mates
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane - who slammed team-mates on Wednesday - has been left on the bench by England interim boss Lee Carsley for the UEFA Nations League match against Greece

arts.ttl: England's Kane benched for Greece clash; Watkins in
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane has been left on the bench for Thursday's UEFA Nations League clash against Greece, with Ollie Watkins taking his place in the starting lineup.
